series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Guaranty Corporation Examination Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These records contain examination reports of a Guaranty Corporation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years following the date of examination, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
